title: ‘Equality is not a paper commitment’: the EU’s quiet push to enforce LGBTIQ+ rights [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The most recent Fundamental Rights Agency survey reports 36 per cent of LGBTIQ+ people in the EU reported experiencing discrimination in the previous year; 55 per cent reported harassment
summary_public: The most recent Fundamental Rights Agency survey reports 36 per cent of LGBTIQ+ people in the EU reported experiencing discrimination in the previous year; 55 per cent reported harassment
